title: Job Openings at Medife Limited
content:
Medife Limited, a real estate and consulting company, is recruiting to fill the following positions below: 

1.) Junior Accountant

Job Location: Lagos 

Job Summary
     

            
    




	Kuddy Cosmetics International is seeking a detail-oriented, organized and adaptable Junior Accountant to support the Company's finance and accounting operations.
	The successful candidate will assist with maintaining accurate financial records, transaction postings, reconciliations, financial documentation and routine accounting activities.
	The role requires a candidate who is willing to learn, adapt quickly and  work effectively in a fast-paced retail and cosmetics business environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Record and post daily financial transactions accurately.
	Assist with bank, cash and account reconciliations.
	Maintain accurate accounting records and supporting documentation.
	Assist in preparing periodic financial and management reports.
	Monitor expenses, receipts, invoices and payment documentation.
	Support accounts payable and accounts receivable activities.
	Assist with sales and revenue reconciliation across business locations.
	Review financial entries and identify discrepancies for prompt resolution.
	Support inventory and stock-related financial reconciliations.
	Maintain proper filing of financial documents, invoices, receipts and vouchers.
	Assist with audit preparation and provide required accounting documentation.


Qualifications and Experience


	B.Sc. or HND in Accounting, Finance or a related discipline.
	2–3 years of relevant accounting experience.
	Good understanding of basic accounting principles and financial record keeping.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and other Microsoft Office applications.
	Experience using accounting or ERP software.
	Experience using Odoo will be an added advantage.


Candidate Preference:


	Candidates residing within or around Ojo, Festac, Iyana Iba, Mile 2 and neighbouring areas are preferred due to proximity to the work location.


Application Closing Date: 31st August, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Location "Junior Accountant-Festac" as the subject of the email.

Note: Only candidates who meet the requirements and stay within close proximity would be contacted.

 

 

2.) Decorator

Job Location: Opebi, Ikeja - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
 Work Days: Monday – Saturday
Work Hours: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM

About the Role


	We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented Cake/Pastry Decorator to join our team in Opebi, Ikeja. The ideal candidate will bring artistic flair and precision to finishing baked goods, ensuring every product meets our brand's presentation and quality standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Decorate cakes, pastries, and other baked goods according to customer specifications, brand standards, or design briefs
	Prepare icing, fondant, buttercream, and other decorative materials
	Execute custom designs for events, celebrations, and special orders with precision
	Ensure consistency in colour, texture, and presentation across all decorated items
	Collaborate with the baking team to align on production timelines and finishing schedules
	Maintain hygiene and food safety standards during decoration and finishing processes
	Manage and account for decorating supplies and materials
	Stay updated on current cake design trends and suggest creative ideas to enhance product offerings


Requirements


	SSCE / OND or relevant qualification; culinary arts or cake decorating certification is an advantage
	2–3 years of experience in cake/pastry decorating
	Strong portfolio or demonstrable skill in cake design, icing work, and finishing techniques
	Creativity, attention to detail, and a steady hand for precision work
	Ability to work under pressure to meet order deadlines, especially during peak/event periods
	Good communication and customer-service orientation, particularly for custom order consultations
	Must reside within or close to Ikeja/Opebi axis (preferred, due to work hours).


Benefits


	Salary: N130,000 – N200,000 monthly (based on experience)
	Benefits: HMO (Health Insurance).


Application Closing Date: 15th August, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a portfolio (photos of previous decorating work) to: [email protected] using "Application – Decorator" as the subject of the mail.

 

3.) Shelf Coordinator

Job Location: Tradefair, Ojo - Lagos
 Work Mode: Monday - Saturday. 8:30am-5:00pm
Gender: Male and Female 

Description


	As a shelf coordinator in the warehouse/ inventory unit of Kuddy Cosmetics you are expected to keeptrack of the goods and supplies in the store, manageorders to facilitate sales.
	Your duties includes counting the numbers of product available, picking and arranging orders, cleaning and placing orders for more inventory according to demand.


Responsibilities


	Prompt requisition of products on assigned shelves and ensuring minimal occurrence of stock out i.e. unavailability of products on the shelves.
	Prompt identification of damaged and products close to expiration on assigned shelves.
	Picking invoices for branches and customers in a timely and efficient manner.
	Ensuring the store and products are neat at all times for a conducive work environment.
	Updating inventory count and maintaining inventory records, Reporting discrepancies in inventory that indicate theft, such as too little inventory at last count
	Ensuring products on shelves are well arranged and in great condition at all times
	Ensure all new products received from the warehouse are shelved, pay attention to details to ensure no damage or shortages.
	Pick and deliver stock orders from branches and customers on a timely basis, and ensure all packing list is send to th appropriate personnel
	Assist in receiving major shipment of major consignments (container) as needed.
	Additional duties as needed in the inventory/warehouse team.


Qualification


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor`s Degree.
	Only candidates who stay around Mile 2, Ojo Barracks and Iyana Iba should apply.


Salary
N104,000 monthly.

Application Closing Date: 20th July, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and your Location as the subject of the email (e.g Shelf Coordinator-Mile 2).

Note: Only candidates who stay around Mile 2, Ojo Barracks and Iyana Iba should apply.

     

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketing Manager",
  "description": "Carlcare Development Nigeria Limited, formerly known as Tecno Telecoms - established in July 2006, is a high-tech company specializing in the R&amp;D, production, sale and service of mobile communication products. After years of development, Carlcare Development has become an important part of the mobile phone industry and one of the major mobile phone manufacturers in the world. Currently, it has full ownership of three famous mobile phone brands TECNO, itel and Infinix, and an after-sales service brand Carlcare.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are looking for an experienced marketing professional to lead digital marketing, brand communications, influencer partnerships, and marketing activations for a leading consumer brand in Nigeria.&nbsp;
	The successful candidate will have a strong understanding of the Nigerian market, extensive experience managing social media campaigns, and the ability to execute high-impact marketing initiatives that strengthen brand awareness and drive business growth.


Key Responsibilities
Digital Marketing &amp; Social Media:


	Develop and execute social media strategies across Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, X (Twitter), YouTube, and other relevant platforms.
	Create and manage content calendars aligned with product launches, campaigns, and key seasonal events.
	Grow online communities and improve customer engagement through relevant and localized content.
	Monitor campaign performance and optimize strategies using analytics and insights.
	Keep up with digital trends, platform updates, and emerging consumer behavior.


Influencer &amp; Creator Marketing:


	Build and manage relationships with influencers, content creators, media personalities, and brand ambassadors.
	Plan and execute influencer campaigns from talent selection through content delivery and performance reporting.
	Evaluate campaign effectiveness and optimize influencer investments.
	Maintain a strong network of partners across technology, lifestyle, entertainment, and consumer sectors.


Brand Activations &amp; Events:


	Lead the planning and execution of product launches, experiential marketing campaigns, exhibitions, roadshows, and other brand activations.
	Coordinate with agencies, vendors, and event partners to deliver high-quality marketing activities.
	Identify sponsorship and partnership opportunities that enhance brand visibility.
	Measure and report on event performance and business impact.


Marketing Strategy:


	Support the development and execution of annual marketing plans.
	Work closely with sales, product, and trade marketing teams to align marketing initiatives with business objectives.
	Manage marketing budgets and agency relationships.
	Conduct market research and competitor analysis to support strategic decision-making.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Marketing, Communications, Business Administration, or a related discipline.
	5&ndash;8 years of marketing experience, preferably within consumer electronics, FMCG, telecommunications, or other fast-moving consumer industries.
	Strong experience in digital marketing, social media management, influencer marketing, and event execution.
	Good understanding of Nigerian consumer behavior and the local digital landscape.
	Existing relationships with influencers, media partners, and marketing agencies are an advantage.
	Strong communication, project management, and stakeholder management skills.
	Analytical mindset with experience using marketing and social media analytics tools.
	Willingness to travel within Nigeria when required.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to: adebayo.deborah@transsion.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Marketing Manager Job at Carlcare Development Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Carlcare Development Nigeria Limited, formerly known as Tecno Telecoms - established in July 2006, is a high-tech company specializing in the R&D, production, sale and service of mobile communication products. After years of development, Carlcare Development has become an important part of the mobile phone industry and one of the major mobile phone manufacturers in the world. Currently, it has full ownership of three famous mobile phone brands TECNO, itel and Infinix, and an after-sales service brand Carlcare.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

            
    




	We are looking for an experienced marketing professional to lead digital marketing, brand communications, influencer partnerships, and marketing activations for a leading consumer brand in Nigeria. 
	The successful candidate will have a strong understanding of the Nigerian market, extensive experience managing social media campaigns, and the ability to execute high-impact marketing initiatives that strengthen brand awareness and drive business growth.


Key Responsibilities
Digital Marketing & Social Media:


	Develop and execute social media strategies across Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, X (Twitter), YouTube, and other relevant platforms.
	Create and manage content calendars aligned with product launches, campaigns, and key seasonal events.
	Grow online communities and improve customer engagement through relevant and localized content.
	Monitor campaign performance and optimize strategies using analytics and insights.
	Keep up with digital trends, platform updates, and emerging consumer behavior.


Influencer & Creator Marketing:


	Build and manage relationships with influencers, content creators, media personalities, and brand ambassadors.
	Plan and execute influencer campaigns from talent selection through content delivery and performance reporting.
	Evaluate campaign effectiveness and optimize influencer investments.
	Maintain a strong network of partners across technology, lifestyle, entertainment, and consumer sectors.


Brand Activations & Events:


	Lead the planning and execution of product launches, experiential marketing campaigns, exhibitions, roadshows, and other brand activations.
	Coordinate with agencies, vendors, and event partners to deliver high-quality marketing activities.
	Identify sponsorship and partnership opportunities that enhance brand visibility.
	Measure and report on event performance and business impact.


Marketing Strategy:


	Support the development and execution of annual marketing plans.
	Work closely with sales, product, and trade marketing teams to align marketing initiatives with business objectives.
	Manage marketing budgets and agency relationships.
	Conduct market research and competitor analysis to support strategic decision-making.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Marketing, Communications, Business Administration, or a related discipline.
	5–8 years of marketing experience, preferably within consumer electronics, FMCG, telecommunications, or other fast-moving consumer industries.
	Strong experience in digital marketing, social media management, influencer marketing, and event execution.
	Good understanding of Nigerian consumer behavior and the local digital landscape.
	Existing relationships with influencers, media partners, and marketing agencies are an advantage.
	Strong communication, project management, and stakeholder management skills.
	Analytical mindset with experience using marketing and social media analytics tools.
	Willingness to travel within Nigeria when required.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Category Manager - Direct",
  "description": "Seven-Up Bottling Company Limited is one of the largest manufacturing companies in Nigeria, producing and distributing some of the nation&rsquo;s most- loved beverages in the country like; Pepsi, 7Up, Mirinda, Teem, Mountain Dew, H2oH!, Lipton Ice Tea and Aquafina premium drinking water. SBC has recently entered into Home &amp; Personal Care category with the 2SURE brand and launched its first product, a Hand &amp; Surface Sanitizer. Seven Up boasts of nine bottling plants with state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities strategically located across various regions in the country.&nbsp;

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Category Manager - Direct

Job Location: Lagos
Industry: FMCG

Job Summary


	Managing the sourcing and procurement of Category B (part) &amp; C Raw &amp; Packaging Materials for SBC


Responsibilities


	Develop a Sourcing Strategy that delivers best in class raw &amp; packaging materials for the organization
	Develop and maintain a structure that coordinates sourcing and contract management activities across the Direct procurement category, delivering targeted benefits to SBC
	Collaborate with internal customers to interpret the ongoing supply plan for the category. (Stakeholder Management)
	Consistently monitor market trends to stay abreast of the factors impacting on demand and supply, to be able to forecast trends, and implement actions, that positively impacts the SBCs position.
	Leverage on e- procurement tools; E-RFPs, E-RFQs, E-options etc to drive benefits for the business.
	Deliver best in class (cheapest) pricing to give cost advantage to the business
	Align pricing of all RPM with GM Procurement at the beginning of a new period.
	Develop &amp; agree pricing formulas with GM Procurement for all relevant RPM
	Track and monitor all spend related to direct procurement category vis-&agrave;-vis the approved FY budget
	Work with Team to propose, track and subsequently implement corrective actions and coaching for vendors that fail to meet contract requirements.
	Manage the supplier performance system, ensuring adherence to terms and conditions, Service Level Agreement, and specified Key Performance Indicators on a quarterly basis.
	Develop and implement category communication plans, including sharing new contract agreements and procedures for complying.
	Develop a robust supplier repository to facilitate the procurement at optimal price and quality at all times.
	Ensure overall business strategies, goals, and changes from senior leadership are understood and successfully executed. Communicate the unit goals to the team, motivating them in the accomplishment of set goals and objectives.
	Foster an environment for successful working relationships, ensuring improved morale and engagement levels.
	Guide, coach and motivate team to drive high performance and improve value creation.
	Set key result areas, key performance indicators and goals for team members. (Annual goal Setting)
	Track and measure the progress of established goals. (Quarterly performance reviews and constructive feedback).
	Recommend and facilitate developmental interventions to bridge identified competency gaps.
	Interview, hire and train new hires as the business requires.
	Other duties as assigned within job scope.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree preferably in Supply Chain Management or any relevant field.
	Minimum of 6 cognate years of experience, preferably in the FMCG industry, handling procurement, vendor management, sourcing etc
	Intermediate level proficiency in the Microsoft Suite, especially Excel.
	Relevant professional certification is an added advantage.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@sevenup.org using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only selected candidate will be contacted.",

Category Manager - Direct Job at Seven-Up Bottling Company Limited




        
    

        
        Seven-Up Bottling Company Limited is one of the largest manufacturing companies in Nigeria, producing and distributing some of the nation’s most- loved beverages in the country like; Pepsi, 7Up, Mirinda, Teem, Mountain Dew, H2oH!, Lipton Ice Tea and Aquafina premium drinking water. SBC has recently entered into Home & Personal Care category with the 2SURE brand and launched its first product, a Hand & Surface Sanitizer. Seven Up boasts of nine bottling plants with state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities strategically located across various regions in the country. 

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Category Manager - Direct
     

            
    



Job Location: Lagos
Industry: FMCG

Job Summary


	Managing the sourcing and procurement of Category B (part) & C Raw & Packaging Materials for SBC


Responsibilities


	Develop a Sourcing Strategy that delivers best in class raw & packaging materials for the organization
	Develop and maintain a structure that coordinates sourcing and contract management activities across the Direct procurement category, delivering targeted benefits to SBC
	Collaborate with internal customers to interpret the ongoing supply plan for the category. (Stakeholder Management)
	Consistently monitor market trends to stay abreast of the factors impacting on demand and supply, to be able to forecast trends, and implement actions, that positively impacts the SBCs position.
	Leverage on e- procurement tools; E-RFPs, E-RFQs, E-options etc to drive benefits for the business.
	Deliver best in class (cheapest) pricing to give cost advantage to the business
	Align pricing of all RPM with GM Procurement at the beginning of a new period.
	Develop & agree pricing formulas with GM Procurement for all relevant RPM
	Track and monitor all spend related to direct procurement category vis-à-vis the approved FY budget
	Work with Team to propose, track and subsequently implement corrective actions and coaching for vendors that fail to meet contract requirements.
	Manage the supplier performance system, ensuring adherence to terms and conditions, Service Level Agreement, and specified Key Performance Indicators on a quarterly basis.
	Develop and implement category communication plans, including sharing new contract agreements and procedures for complying.
	Develop a robust supplier repository to facilitate the procurement at optimal price and quality at all times.
	Ensure overall business strategies, goals, and changes from senior leadership are understood and successfully executed. Communicate the unit goals to the team, motivating them in the accomplishment of set goals and objectives.
	Foster an environment for successful working relationships, ensuring improved morale and engagement levels.
	Guide, coach and motivate team to drive high performance and improve value creation.
	Set key result areas, key performance indicators and goals for team members. (Annual goal Setting)
	Track and measure the progress of established goals. (Quarterly performance reviews and constructive feedback).
	Recommend and facilitate developmental interventions to bridge identified competency gaps.
	Interview, hire and train new hires as the business requires.
	Other duties as assigned within job scope.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree preferably in Supply Chain Management or any relevant field.
	Minimum of 6 cognate years of experience, preferably in the FMCG industry, handling procurement, vendor management, sourcing etc
	Intermediate level proficiency in the Microsoft Suite, especially Excel.
	Relevant professional certification is an added advantage.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only selected candidate will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

We swiftly provide top-quality power generating equipment, ensuring uninterrupted supply from 30kva to 1,000 kva generators. With skilled technicians and a comprehensive fleet including HIABs and utility vehicles, we&#39;re the go-to choice in generator rental. Expanding our services to include lighting tower hire, we offer reliable solutions for smooth operations in Nigeria&#39;s challenging power landscape. Trust us for efficient power outsourcing, available on-demand for all your needs.

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Content Creation: Produce 12&ndash;15 unique pieces of content per month (consistently distributed, not bulk-posted). This includes short-form videos (Reels/TikTok), static graphics, and professional updates.
	Platform Management: Manage and publish content across Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, and LinkedIn.
	Rapid Turnaround: Edit, finalize, and publish site-visit or event content within 48 hours of creation/receipt.
	Community Engagement: Monitor and respond to public comments within 24 hours during business hours (Monday&ndash;Friday).
	Lead Handover: Seamlessly route all direct messages (DMs) and pricing inquiries to the Customer Service team.
	Reporting: Submit a Monthly Performance Report tracking Reach/Impressions, Follower Growth, Engagement Rate, and top-performing posts.

Social Media Manager Job at Rapid Rentals Limited




        
    

        
        Rapid Rentals limited is a Nigerian owned company that has been providing alternative power solutions since 2010. We swiftly provide top-quality power generating equipment, ensuring uninterrupted supply from 30kva to 1,000 kva generators. With skilled technicians and a comprehensive fleet including HIABs and utility vehicles, we're the go-to choice in generator rental. Expanding our services to include lighting tower hire, we offer reliable solutions for smooth operations in Nigeria's challenging power landscape. Trust us for efficient power outsourcing, available on-demand for all your needs.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Social Media Manager
     

            
    



Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Content Creation: Produce 12–15 unique pieces of content per month (consistently distributed, not bulk-posted). This includes short-form videos (Reels/TikTok), static graphics, and professional updates.
	Platform Management: Manage and publish content across Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, and LinkedIn.
	Rapid Turnaround: Edit, finalize, and publish site-visit or event content within 48 hours of creation/receipt.
	Community Engagement: Monitor and respond to public comments within 24 hours during business hours (Monday–Friday).
	Lead Handover: Seamlessly route all direct messages (DMs) and pricing inquiries to the Customer Service team.
	Reporting: Submit a Monthly Performance Report tracking Reach/Impressions, Follower Growth, Engagement Rate, and top-performing posts.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "ICU Nurse",
  "description": "Anas Atiantic Services Limited is a dynamic and client-centric business services company registered and operating in Ikeja, Lagos, Nigeria. We are committed to delivering high-quality solutions that help businesses grow, compete, and connect in today&rsquo;s fast-changing market.&nbsp;

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: ICU Nurse

Job Location: Ikotun, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for an ICU Nurse to join our team and deliver high quality, compassionate care to all patients in our ICU department.
	ICU Nurse responsibilities include evaluating a patient&rsquo;s condition and administering treatment, as well providing constant support throughout recovery time.
	Ultimately, you will&nbsp;work directly with patients to ensure they receive the attention and medical care needed based on their condition.


Responsibilities


	Deliver regular updates to doctors, patients and their family members.
	Begin treatment and monitor doses.
	Respond to a medical emergency and alert the appropriate Doctors as needed.
	Care for patient needs throughout their recovery in the ICU unit.
	Complete all necessary paperwork before transferring a patient.
	Maintain patient records.
	Create and implement effective care plans.


Requirements


	Experience as an ICU Nurse or similar role.
	Good understanding of health information structures and technology.
	Available to work 12-hour day and night shifts.
	Demonstrate brilliant empathy and communication skills.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 / month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their detailed CV to: anasatianticserviceslimited@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.&nbsp;",

ICU Nurse Job at Anas Atiantic Services Limited




        
    

        
        Anas Atiantic Services Limited is a dynamic and client-centric business services company registered and operating in Ikeja, Lagos, Nigeria. We are committed to delivering high-quality solutions that help businesses grow, compete, and connect in today’s fast-changing market. 

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: ICU Nurse

Job Location: Ikotun, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are looking for an ICU Nurse to join our team and deliver high quality, compassionate care to all patients in our ICU department.
	ICU Nurse responsibilities include evaluating a patient’s condition and administering treatment, as well providing constant support throughout recovery time.
	Ultimately, you will work directly with patients to ensure they receive the attention and medical care needed based on their condition.


Responsibilities


	Deliver regular updates to doctors, patients and their family members.
	Begin treatment and monitor doses.
	Respond to a medical emergency and alert the appropriate Doctors as needed.
	Care for patient needs throughout their recovery in the ICU unit.
	Complete all necessary paperwork before transferring a patient.
	Maintain patient records.
	Create and implement effective care plans.


Requirements


	Experience as an ICU Nurse or similar role.
	Good understanding of health information structures and technology.
	Available to work 12-hour day and night shifts.
	Demonstrate brilliant empathy and communication skills.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their detailed CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.     

    

        Click here to Apply
